name: SomeConfig Issue Repro
postStartCommand: if [ -n "$CODESPACE_NAME" ]; then grep -q '^SS_BASE_URL=' .env 2>/dev/null && sed -i "s|^SS_BASE_URL=.*|SS_BASE_URL=\"https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-8888.${GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN}\"|" .env || echo "SS_BASE_URL=\"https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-8888.${GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN}\"" >> .env; fi && sudo apache2ctl start 2>/dev/null || true
